startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Search pages or repository listing pages on GitHub/GitLab to start from.

repoQuery.title: Repository Query (optional)
repoQuery.description: Optional free-text query to filter repositories (if not using startUrls).

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl.

minStars.title: Minimum Stars
minStars.description: Only collect repositories with at least this many stars (best-effort).

scanFiles.title: Scan Files
scanFiles.description: File names/paths to look for inside repositories (package.json, requirements.txt, Dockerfile, etc.).

siteAllowList.title: Site allow list
siteAllowList.description: If set, only follow links inside these hostnames.
